revision.comment: Created page with "#redirect[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]"
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Piped link]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Marking a third subcategory, unfortunately there will probably be overlap with the second category, but I think that is probably worth it, no harm unless a cumulative thousand are in the overlap
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Piped link]][[Category:hh]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] removing the top category for 2k-3k using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Piped link]][[Category:hh]]

revision.comment: confirming the redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[Piped link]][[category:confirmed wikipedia redirects]][[en:Help:Piped link]][[Category:hh]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing the redirects]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[Piped link]][[category:confirmed wikipedia redirects]][[en:Help:Piped link]][[Category:hh]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Confirmed wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pp]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[Piped link]][[Category:Confirmed wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pp]] [[en:Help:Piped link]][[Category:hh]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]]

revision.comment: wikipedia redirects 4
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Piped link]][[Category:Confirmed wikipedia redirects 4]] [[Category:pp]] [[en:Help:Piped link]][[Category:hh]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Confirmed wikipedia redirects 4
revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Help:Piped link
revision.text:
#redirect[[en:Piped link]]
[[en:Help:Piped link]]

revision.comment: removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
revision.text:
redirect[[:en:Piped link]]
[[en:Help:Piped link]]

revision.comment: Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25424774555|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: redirect[[:en:Piped link]] {{wikidata link||en|Help:Piped link}}
